nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 藍翅鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 藍翅鸚鵡（Blue-winged parrot，学名 Neophema chrysostoma），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于Heinrich Kuhl、塔斯馬尼亞州、澳大利亚，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽。

nodes.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州
nodes.summary: 塔斯馬尼亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联47种鸟类，包括澳大利亚麻鸭、Brown quail、Hoary-headed grebe等47种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Heinrich Kuhl
nodes.summary: Heinrich Kuhl是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Black-capped petrel、长喙凤头鹦鹉、藍翅鸚鵡等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blue-winged parrot (Neophema chrysostoma), also known as the blue-banded parakeet or blue-banded grass-parakeet, is a small parrot found in Tasmania and southeast mainland Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blue-winged parrot (Neophema chrysostoma), also known as the blue-banded parakeet or blue-banded grass-parakeet, is a small parrot found in Tasmania and southeast mainland Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blue-winged parrot (Neophema chrysostoma), also known as the blue-banded parakeet or blue-banded grass-parakeet, is a small parrot found in Tasmania and southeast mainland Australia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is more sporadic across central and western New South Wales and into Queensland, as far north as Diamantina National Park. It lives in savannah woodland, grasslands, orchards, farmlands, marshes, heath, dunes, and other open habitats up to above sea level
